## Summary

<!-- What changed and why. Reference issues. -->

## Type

- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] refactor / chore (no behavior change)
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test / ci

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:` …) — release-please consumes these
- [ ] `bash tests/run.sh` passes locally
- [ ] New ecosystem? Added parser + registry lookup + fixture + tests
- [ ] If plugin behavior changed: CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
